summary: Frontend-only smoke test of the 'Invalid Token' reconciliation bug fix. Logged in as Yashgadam and clicked ONLY the 'Check Angel One' button. No START/STOP/order/square-off/settings actions performed (real-money account).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login uses data-testid=login-username / login-password. Reconcile trigger is data-testid=reconcile-check-button; result container is data-testid=reconcile-widget with sub-states reconcile-good / reconcile-entry-missed / reconcile-exit-missed / reconcile-unavailable. GET /api/bot/reconcile returned 200 {available:true,state:'GOOD',message:'Bot and Angel One match - everything is in sync.',mode:'LIVE',broker_netqty:0}. STRICTLY do NOT click START/STOP, Buy/Sell 1 Lot, Sync, Adopt, Reset, Connect/Disconnect on this LIVE real-money account.

verification_details.reconcile_api_body: {"available":true,"state":"GOOD","message":"Bot and Angel One match - everything is in sync.","mode":"LIVE","bot_position":null,"broker_netqty":0,"broker_avgprice":null}
verification_details.widget_text_shown: Everything is good — Bot and Angel One match - everything is in sync. Broker net qty: 0

rca of the issue: Original bug: angel_broker.get_net_position()/get_day_pnl() called Angel SmartAPI position() with no relogin retry, so an expired session bubbled up as 'Invalid Token' via /api/bot/reconcile. Fix (2 attempts + relogin() on first failure) is confirmed working: reconciliation now returns 200 GOOD state and the Dashboard renders 'Everything is good' with no 'Invalid Token' text anywhere in the response or UI.
